title: WS15 1PR, Rugeley Power Limited: environmental permit partial surrender issued - EPR/EP3538LB/S005
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Rugeley Power Limited Installation name: Rugeley Power Station Permit number: EPR/EP3538LB/S005  "
